subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles (e.g., buyer, seller, vendor, service provider), and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract task (small tier) is optimal here. This is a straightforward structured field extraction from one document—party names, roles, and addresses are explicit contract elements that do not require cross-source reconciliation, multi-step inference, or complex document parsing logic. The small tier is sufficient for a single-pass extraction of standard contractual parties and their details.
